title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Ambuja Cements - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Ambuja Cements - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Ambuja Cements are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
